notes: Corporate foundation affiliated with Aaron's Company. Rachel George has 20+ years with Aaron's. Foundation partners with Boys & Girls Clubs. Kelly Wall previously served as board member (now CFO at BlueLinx). Main corporate line provided; no direct foundation number found.

notes: Diana chairs the Alaska Airlines Foundation board. She is also CEO of Hawaiian Airlines and SVP at Alaska Air Group. Foundation makes grants $5K-$20K to Alaska/Hawaii youth programs. Application deadlines: July 1. Online application portal only.

notes: Private foundation in Pasadena, CA. Michael Spurgeon serves as EVP and Director of Center on Literary Arts (since 2020). Janna Beling is President/Director. Foundation makes grants by INVITATION ONLY - does not accept unsolicited requests. Typical grant: $10K. Focus: LA County nonprofits, youth development, poverty elimination, environment.
